name: Demetrius Desmond
alt_names: デミトリアス・デズモンド
description: First son of the Desmond family and the older brother of [Damian Desmond](https://anilist.co/character/150424/). He is an Imperial Scholar and is noted by [Loid Forger](https://anilist.co/character/138101/) to be an exceptional student, barely getting a single question wrong on the midterm exams.
